path: PNGS/Aqa ﷺ named Hassan and Hussain.png
text: Itwas narrated that ‘Al (G 41 -2 said: ‘When al-Hasan was born, | named him Hamzah. When al-Hugalin was born, I named him after his paternal uncle Jafar. Then the Messenger of Allah (%) called me and ssid: 1 have been commanded to change the names of these two. I said: Alah and His Messenger know best. And he named them Hasan and Hugain. (o 5 =) ‘Grade: Hasan (Darussalam)] (Darussalam) .
